permissions.name: RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory
permissions.rationale: Can change Entra directory role assignments and settings.
permissions.recommendation: Confirm the permission is essential, tightly owned, and continuously monitored.

permissions.name: AppRoleAssignment.ReadWrite.All
permissions.rationale: Can grant or remove application role assignments.
permissions.recommendation: Restrict to a controlled identity-governance workflow and validate ownership.

permissions.name: DelegatedPermissionGrant.ReadWrite.All
permissions.rationale: Can manage delegated permission grants for any API.
permissions.recommendation: Remove unless an approved consent-management service requires it.

permissions.name: Directory.ReadWrite.All
permissions.rationale: Provides broad write access to directory data.
permissions.recommendation: Replace with narrower resource-specific permissions where possible.

permissions.name: Application.ReadWrite.All
permissions.rationale: Can create and modify applications and service principals.
permissions.recommendation: Validate the workload, owners, credential controls, and necessity of tenant-wide scope.

permissions.name: User.ReadWrite.All
permissions.recommendation: Use a narrower user-management permission or controlled administrative workflow.

permissions.name: Group.ReadWrite.All
permissions.rationale: Can modify groups and group memberships across the tenant.
permissions.recommendation: Confirm tenant-wide write access is required and monitor membership changes.

permissions.name: Mail.ReadWrite
permissions.rationale: Can read and modify mailbox content.
permissions.recommendation: Limit mailbox scope with application access controls where supported.

permissions.name: Mail.ReadWrite.All
permissions.rationale: Can read and modify mailbox content broadly.
permissions.recommendation: Validate tenant-wide need and use resource-scoped controls where supported.

permissions.name: Mail.Send
permissions.rationale: Can send mail as users or the signed-in user, depending on grant type.
permissions.recommendation: Validate sender scope, ownership, and monitoring.

permissions.name: Files.ReadWrite.All
permissions.rationale: Can read and modify files across accessible storage.
permissions.recommendation: Reduce scope and verify the application still requires write access.

permissions.name: Sites.FullControl.All
permissions.rationale: Provides full control of SharePoint sites.
permissions.recommendation: Replace with selected-site permissions and explicit site assignments where possible.
